comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato) mm1-16 + Refrain (Leisurely) mm17-51. Pipeline dropped most verse lyrics (6 GAP measures), read 'Refrain' direction as lyric, completely missed the 'What do I do-oo-oo? Dream a-bout you-oo-oo!' section (mm21-25), and has heavy v1/v2 stacking in mm34-41. Final section mm42-47 also mostly GAP. Two OCR garbles in verse ('hing,'→'ning,', 'Tho'→'The'). Copyright text misread as lyrics in m51.

2.comment: Pipeline had 'got me, I find I'm' (5 on 6n) — missing 'not'. Published Ira: 'got me, I find I'm not'.

3.comment: Pipeline had 'not me, Tho me Id' (5 on 6n) — 'not' displaced from m2, 'Tho' OCR for 'The', 'Id' missing apostrophe. Published: 'me, The me I'd known in'.

4.comment: GAP 5n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'the past.' — 2 syllables on 5 notes (3 held continuation).

5.comment: GAP 4n+1r. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'You sim-ply stun'.

6.comment: Pipeline had 'Love has un' (3 on 6n) — missing 'me,' from end of previous phrase. Published: 'me, Love has un-'.

7.comment: Pipeline had 'done' (1 on 4n) — missing 3 syllables. Published: 'done me at last.'.

9.comment: GAP 4n+1r. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'From the be-gin-'.

10.comment: GAP 6n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: '-ning You had me' — 4 syllables on 6 notes (2 held).

11.comment: Pipeline had 'spin hing, round your' (4 on 6n) — 'hing,' is OCR for 'ning,', missing 'A-' before 'round'. Published: 'spin-ning, A-round your'.

12.comment: Pipeline had 'fin ger I'm twirl' (4 on 5n) — 'twirl' should be 'twirled.' (one syllable, not split). Published: 'fin-ger I'm twirled.'.

13.comment: Pipeline had 'ed But who's re' (4 on 4n+1r) — 'ed' is displaced from m12 ('twirled' is one syllable). Published: 'But who's re-'.

17.comment: Pipeline read 'Refrain' stage direction as lyric. PDF shows 'Refrain (Leisurely)' is a tempo marking, not a sung word. Clearing.

21.comment: GAP 2n+3r. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'What do' — start of 'What do I do-oo-oo?' section.

22.comment: GAP 4n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'I do-oo-oo?' — melismatic triplet.

23.comment: GAP 3n+2r. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'Dream a-bout'.

24.comment: GAP 4n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'you-oo-oo!' — melismatic triplet, 3 syllables on 4 notes (1 held).

29.comment: Pipeline had 'den Sud ly' (3 on 3n+2r) — garbled syllable order. Published: 'Sud-den-ly'.

30.comment: Pipeline had 'my gloom old' (3 on 3n+1r) — 'old' should be 'y' (from 'gloom-y'). Published: 'my gloom-y'.

31.comment: Pipeline had 'sky turned ma. bright 'ly' (5 on 5n) — garbled order, stray period. Published: 'old sky turned ma-gic-'ly'. Pipeline detected 5 notes for 6 syllables; merging 'gic-'ly' on last note.

36.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'op tak po ing site me you. on.' (8 on 5n). Published v1: 'op-po-site you.' — 4 syllables on 5 notes (1 held).

37.comment: Pipeline had 'And' (1 on 1n+1r) — stacking artifact, not in published text. Clearing.

38.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'You'll Be i find lieve live love me for' (9 on 3n+1r). Published v1: 'You'll find love'.

39.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'ev when er this last ing; says.' (7 on 4n). Published v1: 'ev-er-last-ing;'.

40.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'Sum You're. mer, the spring why and and fall where time, fore,' (12 on 6n). Published v1: 'Sum-mer, spring and fall-time,'.

41.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'You're I my am one here and to all care' (10 on 5n). Published v1: 'You're my one and all-time.' — 6 syllables but 5 notes; merging 'all-time.' on last note.

42.comment: GAP 4n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'All I live for'.

43.comment: Pipeline had 'You're' (1 on 5n) — garble/displacement. Published: 'now is to hold you'.

46.comment: GAP 4n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'All the live-long' (repeat of refrain).

47.comment: GAP 5n. Pipeline had no lyrics. Published: 'day and the long, long'.

51.comment: Pipeline read copyright text 'music company' as lyrics. Clearing.
